content: Neon serverless digest job pitfalls: (1) pg_cron NOT supported on Neon — requires external cron (Vercel cron, GitHub Actions, or QStash); (2) Direct TCP connections exhaust Postgres connection limits — must use pooled URL with PgBouncer; (3) PgBouncer runs in transaction mode — session-level features (SET, LISTEN/NOTIFY, SQL PREPARE) break; (4) Neon HTTP driver needed on Netlify/Cloudflare; (5) Scale-to-zero cold starts add latency to first query — relevant for digest jobs that must complete within serverless timeout; (6) Vercel Fluid + pg reuses connections; other platforms need @neondatabase/serverless HTTP driver.
